name: ibm-fms
summary: Foundation Model Stack is a collection of components for development, inference, training, and tuning of foundation models leveraging PyTorch native components.
author_email: Antoni Viros i Martin <aviros@ibm.com>, Davis Wertheimer <Davis.Wertheimer@ibm.com>, Joshua Rosenkranz <jmrosenk@us.ibm.com>, Raghu Kiran Ganti <rganti@us.ibm.com>
